creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Craig Leres from comment #3)

... the toolchain's binaries may be identical, but are the specific libraries and BLOBs located in the tree also? esp32s2 and esp32s3 variants differ compared to esp32 - but, I do not want to blame myself as unskilled noobish. I'll check today in the department, my persoanel computer is too slow to get quick results (I'll check with a port built via poudriere).

Anyway, I have added some minor changes that might of use for you for providing some intial toolchain builds for RISC-V 32 support (the changes are minor). I'd like to open another PR as REQUEST and put the patchfile there, if you do not mind.
